title: Radical Rick: The Complete Episodes — Soft-Cover Proof 2 of 8
source_title: Radical Rick Complete Episodes Soft Cover Proof 2 of 8
alt: Framed full wraparound proof for Radical Rick: The Complete Episodes with a red mat and black frame.
summary: One of only eight full-color press proofs produced for the cover of Radical Rick: The Complete Episodes. This example, numbered 2 of 8, was used by creator Damian Fulton to verify color accuracy and final finish prior to publication. Printed on 12” x 18” heavy stock, it features a hand-crimped “Certified Radical” gold foil seal and is hand-signed and numbered by Fulton.
provenance: Recorded by Lititz BMX as an online acquisition; public product source retained in metadata.
claims: Edition, dimensions and production use are sourced from the Lititz BMX inventory and linked creator product record.
details: Inventory records dimensions of 12 by 18 inches on heavy stock.
Signed and numbered by Damian Fulton according to the inventory record.
rights_statement: Artifact images and Lititz BMX descriptive content remain associated with their respective creators, owners and Lititz BMX. Published for historical, educational and preservation access.
